scripts.description:
### AI Chat Bot

In-game public chat replies using your own AI API key (Gemini, ChatGPT, DeepSeek, or custom).

## Features
- Natural OSRS-style replies (short, casual, abbreviations)
- Conversation memory per player
- Ignore list, interaction limits, and cooldowns
- Optional Discord webhook notifications
- Conversation logging

## Setup
1. Get an API key (e.g. Google AI Studio)
2. Start your main skilling/PVM script first
3. Press **New** in Simba, open this script, and start it
4. Enter your API key / service in the GUI

## Notes
- Designed to run alongside another script in a second tab
- Keep responses in character — it will not claim to be AI

### AIO Lunar Spells

Automates common Lunar spellbook training methods with GUI settings and optional shopping helpers.

## Spells Supported
- Bake Pie
- Humidify
- Spin Flax
- Superglass Make
- Tan Leather
- String Jewellery
- Plank Make
- Recharge Dragonstone

## Features
- Script speed presets (Slow / Normal / Fast / Turbo)
- Optional buy runes / raw materials from the GE
- Optional sell finished noted items
- Optional birdhouse runs (CanadianJames include)
- Stop-at-level support
- Discord webhook notifications
- WaspLib antiban

## Requirements
- On the **Lunar spellbook** with the spell unlocked
- Staff equipped and required runes available
- Item to process at the **top of bank tab 1** (or inventory as noted in script)
- If using a rune pouch, start with it in inventory

## Tips
- GE buy/sell uses above/below market prices — unfilled orders are not auto-cancelled
- Prefer the GUI for most settings

### Draynor Roofhopper

Runs the **Draynor Village** rooftop agility course.

## Features
- Full course obstacle handling
- Mark of grace pickup
- Optional stop-at-level
- Discord webhook on terminate
- Mouse teleport / remote input options via GUI

## Requirements
- Access to the Draynor rooftop course
- Suitable Agility level for the course

## Notes
- Marked as early/testing — expect occasional edge cases
- Configure webhooks and options in the GUI

### Ardougne Superheat Iron

Mines iron at Ardougne, then **Superheats** ore into iron bars for Magic + Smithing XP.

## Features
- Mine → Superheat → bank loop
- Tracks bars made and XP
- WaspLib antiban

## Requirements
- **Superheat Item** unlocked (Magic)
- Nature runes + fire-capable staff / fire runes
- Access to Ardougne iron rocks and a nearby bank
- Ardougne cloak / diary teleports help but are not strictly required depending on setup

## Tips
- Start near the Ardougne mining area with runes ready
- Keep nature runes stocked in bank

### Barronite Miner

Mines barronite in the Cam Torum / dwarven area, with optional smithing of deposits at the anvil and banking.

## Features
- Mine barronite rocks
- Walk to anvil to process deposits
- Bank / deposit handling
- Keeps hammer + barronite shards by default
- XP and shard tracking

## Requirements
- Access to the barronite mining area
- Hammer for processing deposits (kept in inventory/bank)
- Suitable Mining level for barronite

## Tips
- Adjust `ITEMSTOKEEP` if you want to keep extra drops
- Experimental walker is enabled by default

### Calcified Mining

Mines calcified rocks in Cam Torum, with deposit processing and banking options.

## Features
- Mine calcified rocks (optional ignore waterfalls)
- Process deposits at the blacksmith / anvil area
- Power-mining mode (drop)
- Banking support
- Tracks shards, moths, and XP
- Discord webhook on terminate

## Requirements
- Access to Cam Torum mining sites
- Hammer for processing deposits
- Suitable Mining level

## Tips
- Use the GUI for power-mining, waterfall ignore, and webhook settings
- Start with a hammer available in inventory or bank

### Ironwood Woodcutter

Chops ironwood trees with banking or powerchop, nest pickup, and optional world hopping.

## Features
- Multi-tree chopping with special attack support
- Bank logs or powerchop (drop)
- Bird nest pickup
- Prefer populated trees option
- Custom break override
- World hopping on an interval
- Discord hourly + session summary webhooks
- On-screen progress / profit tracking

## Requirements
- Access to ironwood trees
- Suitable Woodcutting level and axe
- Bank nearby if not powerchopping

## Tips
- Configure hopping, breaks, and webhooks in the GUI
- Enable nest pickup if you want nests kept

### Salt Miner

Mines Weiß / salt rocks and can craft **stony** / **icy basalt** from basalt + salts.

## Features
- Mine basalt, efh / te / urt salts
- Optional basalt-only mode
- Craft stony & icy basalt to configured amounts
- Banking / noting support
- GUI-driven targets for each resource

## Requirements
- Access to the salt mine (Weiss)
- Suitable Mining level
- Space for salts / basalt in inventory and bank

## Tips
- Set desired salt and basalt craft amounts in the GUI
- Use basalt-only if you do not need salt grinding

### Sorceress's Garden (Sq'irk)

Runs Sorceress's Garden for summer sq'irks — pick, crush to juice, and hand in for Thieving XP.

## Features
- Enter garden / pick sq'irks
- Make juice with pestle & mortar + beer glass
- Hand in to Osman / Selim flow
- Banking for supplies
- Energy / run restore handling (won't drink sq'irk juice as energy)

## Requirements
- Sorceress's Garden unlocked
- Pestle and mortar + beer glasses in bank
- Suitable Thieving level for summer garden

## Tips
- Keep energy items in bank if you want automatic restores
- Start with glasses and pestle available

### Trouble Brewing

Plays Trouble Brewing for Pieces of Eight — woodcutting, water, fletching, and hopper filling.

## Features
- Join red (north) or blue (south) team
- Woodcutting / scrapey bark flow
- Fill water buckets and hoppers
- Optional power-fletching
- Tracks Pieces of Eight and resources
- Discord webhook options

## Requirements
- Trouble Brewing unlocked (Cabin Fever)
- Suitable gear for the minigame island
- Start at / able to reach the Trouble Brewing lobby

## Tips
- Pick your team and method in the GUI before starting
- Power-fletching is optional for alternate XP focus
